_meta.stability: Frozen for the loom-generation lifetime per ADR-002. Shape additions that preserve wire compatibility (new optional response fields) are allowed; breaking changes require a new generation.
_meta.relation_to_classic: Same request shape as classic POST /api/issues. Response shape changes from IssueDict to IssueLoom (issue_id replaces id).

shape_decl.request_type: {title: str, type?: str, priority?: int, parent_id?: str|null, assignee?: str, description?: str, notes?: str, fields?: dict, labels?: list[str], deps?: list[str], actor?: str}
shape_decl.rationale: Returns the freshly created issue projected through issue_to_loom. Status 201 matches classic.

examples.name: error_title_not_string
examples.note: Validation: title must be a string.
